description: The main agent delegates evidence checking to the researcher sub-agent and uses its supported quote in a proposal.
document:
# Related Work

Prior work suggests retrieval improves factuality.
instruction: Check whether the factuality claim has local support and revise it if supported.

subagent_responses.evidence specialist:
Claim: retrieval improves factuality
Classification: supported
Source: references/rag.md
Verbatim quote: "retrieval-augmented generation reduces unsupported assertions"

input.task: Check this claim against local references: retrieval improves factuality.

input.title: Ground factuality claim
input.summary: Attach the local evidence quote to the claim.

edits.old_text: Prior work suggests retrieval improves factuality.
edits.new_text: Local evidence supports this claim: "retrieval-augmented generation reduces unsupported assertions".

model_script.text: Proposed a grounded revision using the local evidence quote.
